title: Add ChatStreamDataType enum, replace Vec<String>
description: ChatStreamEnable.data_types is Vec<String> in types.rs. The spec defines a closed set: 'typing' and 'presence'. An enum ChatStreamDataType { Typing, Presence, Unknown(String) } with the Unknown catch-all would make invalid data types unrepresentable while remaining forward-compatible.
notes: Part of epic jmap-chat-tui-hqb: jmap-chat wire up enums — eliminate stringly-typed spec fields
